title: Foo Bar CDC Postgres to Redpanda
description: Build a change-data-capture pipeline from Postgres to Redpanda: capture table changes and stream them to a Kafka topic for downstream consumers.

tasks.description: Set up CDC from app.orders to Redpanda orders topic

infrastructure.description: Postgres with app.orders table (id, customer_id, amount, created_at). Redpanda running. No CDC configured.
